title: Rename device - turn off/on the device
scenario: Custom device name does not persist after power cycling the device
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with the device connected.
Tap the device name or gear icon to navigate to Device Settings.
Tap the device's official name field.
Enter a new custom device name.
Tap Done to save the new name.
Power off the device by pressing and holding the Power button.
Power on the device by pressing the Power button again.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and check the device name on the Home screen.
Navigate to Device Settings and verify the device name there as well.
expected: The custom device name is still displayed on the Home screen and in Device Settings after power cycling.
